task.title: Monitor Dashboard v2 Deployment + Start Marketing Pipeline
task.description: Prime is deploying Dashboard v2 to production. Monitor the rollout, verify health, then kick off the marketing content pipeline.
deliverables: Monitor dashboard.autopus.cloud after deploy — verify 200 OK, no 502s
Check container health: docker ps for ocaas-dashboard container
Verify API health: api.autopus.cloud/health returns OK
Start marketing pipeline: create first 'build in public' thread draft for X (@autopus_cloud)
Record current system metrics as deployment baseline
